latHint: Think cards and trickery - not face paint.
pivHint: A CLOWN is a comic performer - what word means a wild card or prankster?
winText: Wild card. CLOWN was the pivot - circus performer to the trickster in the pack.
lossText: JOKER - a prankster or wild card. CLOWN was the pivot: circus act to the JOKER in the deck.
